title: arenaria congesta var. kingii
intro: Arenaria congesta var. kingii, also known as King's Sandwort, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of King's Sandwort include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
